gist.headline: Simplified Pollen Wallets
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the billing dashboard by merging crypto credits directly into your standard pack balance. One unified number, zero confusion.
gist.summary: Consolidated the crypto and pack balance buckets into a single unified pack balance across the API and dashboard.
gist.impact: Users will now see a single, unified pack balance instead of separate crypto and pack totals, making it easier to track available credits.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee organizing glowing digital coins into a single large honey jar, representing the consolidation of balances. The Nomnom creature eating the old, complex ledger.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny accountant visor, organizing glowing digital coins into a single large honey jar. The round Nomnom creature happily eats an old complex ledger nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
